Class LetterList

java.lang.Object
  |
  +--LetterList
public class LetterList
extends java.lang.Object

A LetterList object represents the pile of letter tiles in a Scrabble game. It contains a linked list of the remaining tiles throughout a game.

Constructor Summary
LetterList()
          Constructs a LetterList object.
 
Method Summary
 void add(Letter l)
          Adds a new Letter to the LetterList.
 Letter get_letter()
          Selects a letter at random from a LetterList object and removes that letter from the pile.
 int get_size()
          Accessor function for the current size of a LetterList object.
 
Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object
clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait
 

Constructor Detail

LetterList

public LetterList()
Constructs a LetterList object.
Method Detail

get_letter

public Letter get_letter()
Selects a letter at random from a LetterList object and removes that letter from the pile.
Returns:
the selected letter

get_size

public int get_size()
Accessor function for the current size of a LetterList object.
Returns:
the size of the list

add

public void add(Letter l)
Adds a new Letter to the LetterList.
Parameters:
l - the letter to be added
